2604.11122.title: Semantic-Geometric Dual Compression: Training-Free Visual Token Reduction for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Understanding
2604.11122.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated immense potential in Earth observation. However, the massive visual tokens generated when processing Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) imagery introduce prohibitive computational overhead, severely bottlenecking their inference efficiency. Existing visual token compression methods predominantly adopt static and uniform compression strategies, neglecting the inherent "Semantic-Geometric Duality" in remote sensing interpretation tasks. Specifically, object semantic tasks focus on the abstract semantics of objects and benefit from aggressive background pruning, whereas scene geometric tasks critically rely on the integrity of spatial topology. To address this challenge, we propose DualComp, a task-adaptive dual-stream token compression framework. Dynamically guided by a lightweight pre-trained router, DualComp decouples feature processing into two dedicated pathways. In the object semantic stream, the Spatially-Contiguous Semantic Aggregator (SCSA) utilizes size-adaptive clustering to aggregates redundant background while protecting small object. In the scene geometric stream, the Instruction-Guided Structure Recoverer (IGSR) introduces a greedy path-tracing topology completion mechanism to reconstruct spatial skeletons. Experiments on the UHR remote sensing benchmark XLRS-Bench demonstrate that DualComp accomplishes high-fidelity remote sensing interpretation at an exceptionally low computational cost, achieving simultaneous improvements in both efficiency and accuracy.
2604.11122.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在地球觀測中展現了巨大的潛力。<lb/>然而，在處理超高解析度（UHR）影像時產生的大量視覺標記引入了過高的計算開銷，嚴重瓶頸了它們的推理效率。<lb/>現有的視覺標記壓縮方法主要採用靜態和統一的壓縮策略，忽略了遙感解釋任務中固有的「語義-幾何二元性」。<lb/>具體而言，物體語義任務專注於物體的抽象語義，並受益於激進的背景修剪，而場景幾何任務則關鍵依賴於空間拓撲的完整性。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了DualComp，一個任務自適應的雙通道標記壓縮框架。<lb/>在輕量級預訓練路由器的動態指導下，DualComp將特徵處理解耦為兩個專用的通道。<lb/>在物體語義通道中，空間連續語義聚合器（SCSA）利用尺寸自適應聚類來聚合冗餘背景，同時保護小物體。<lb/>在場景幾何通道中，指令引導結構恢復器（IGSR）引入了一種貪婪的路徑追蹤拓撲完成機制，以重建空間骨架。<lb/>在UHR遙感基準XLRS-Bench上的實驗表明，DualComp以極低的計算成本實現了高保真度的遙感解釋，並在效率和準確性上同時取得了改善。
2604.11122.author: Yueying Li et.al.
2604.11122.authors: Yueying Li, Fengxiang Wang, Yan Li, Mingshuo Chen, Mengying Zhao, Long Lan
